issues.title: Reduce unused JavaScript
issues.description: Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity.

issues.title: Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio.
issues.description: Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read.

items.node: <span class="text-xs text-gold bg-gold/10 border border-gold/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">

issues.title: Reduce JavaScript execution time
issues.description: Consider reducing the time spent parsing, compiling, and executing JS. You may find delivering smaller JS payloads helps with this.

issues.title: Minimize main-thread work
issues.description: Consider reducing the time spent parsing, compiling and executing JS. You may find delivering smaller JS payloads helps with this.

issues.title: Render-blocking requests
issues.description: Requests are blocking the page's initial render, which may delay LCP.

issues.title: Browser errors were logged to the console
issues.description: Errors logged to the console indicate unresolved problems. They can come from network request failures and other browser concerns.

items.description: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found)

issues.title: Speed Index
issues.description: Speed Index shows how quickly the contents of a page are visibly populated.

issues.title: Improve image delivery
issues.description: Reducing the download time of images can improve the perceived load time of the page and LCP.

issues.title: Largest Contentful Paint
issues.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted.

issues.title: Max Potential First Input Delay
issues.description: The maximum potential First Input Delay that your users could experience is the duration of the longest task.

issues.title: Legacy JavaScript
issues.description: Polyfills and transforms enable older browsers to use new JavaScript features. However, many aren't necessary for modern browsers. Consider modifying your JavaScript build process to not transpile

issues.title: Total Blocking Time
issues.description: Sum of all time periods between FCP and Time to Interactive, when task length exceeded 50ms, expressed in milliseconds.
